description: Sr. Informant, a technology development manager at OOO company, received an offer from a conspirator to leak confidential information about new technologies. He used email, Google Drive, USB, and CD-R to exfiltrate data while applying anti-forensic techniques.
tier_note: Ground truth verificable. Usar para scoring de precisión.

artifacts.content: Event ID 4624 (Logon) - 2015-03-23 16:00:22 Eastern Time+DST | Event ID 4647 (Logoff) - 2015-03-23 17:02:53 | Event ID 4608 (Startup) - 2015-03-24 09:21:29 | Event ID 1100 (Shutdown) - 2015-03-24 17:07:26 | Account: informant | IP: 10.11.11.129
forensic_anomalies: Logon activity outside permitted hours (16:00 is the policy limit)
Quick logoff pattern on March 24 following exfiltration activity

artifacts.content: From: spy.conspirator@nist.gov | To: iaman.informant@nist.gov | Subject: (important request) | Body: conformal But, I need a more data. Do your best. | Date: 2015-03-23 | Follow-up: Subject 'Last request' - 2015-03-24 09:26: This is the last request. I want to get the remaining data.
forensic_anomalies: Emails from an external domain (nist.gov) requesting confidential data

artifacts.content: Confidential files found: [secret_project]_pricing_decision.docx, [secret_project]_final_meeting.pptx | Action: Renamed with changed extensions (.docx to .mp3, .pptx to .jpg) | Rename timestamp: 2015-03-23 16:26-17:02 Eastern Time
forensic_anomalies: Deliberate extension changes to conceal actual file content
The files are classified as confidential under company policy

artifacts.content: Google Drive installed and logged in with iaman.informant.personal@gmail.com | Files uploaded to Google Drive and shared | Email sent: 'Login is below.' | CCleaner and Eraser installed afterwards
forensic_anomalies: Use of personal Gmail account to exfiltrate corporate data
Installation of anti-forensic tools (CCleaner, Eraser) after exfiltration

artifacts.content: Connection to network drive: \\10.11.11.128\secured_drive | Directories traversed in search of files | Files copied from network to Desktop\$ data | Network drive disconnected | Network drive IP: 10.11.11.128
forensic_anomalies: Access to secured network drive followed by local file copy
Immediate disconnection after copying files indicates selective collection pattern
